products.description: gTenxor. SimHub plugin and Arduino/gTenxor servo controller. Public prototype/plugin project from 2023; small community footprint. SimHub plugin controls a seat belt/harness from telemetry.

Public community design started in June 2022; OverTake thread first post edited for v1.5 on 2025-11-16. Multiple community builds are reported. Converts simulator telemetry into harness pull for sustained braking and lateral-force cueing.
products.maker: Hoernle / OverTake and Virtual Racing community
products.license: Free community project; explicit hardware/software license not found in researched sources.

products.description: LeBois GT v3.0 Belt Tensioner. SimHub Arduino 350 W motor-and-spool DIY harness tensioner. Budget DIY active harness tensioner for braking, ABS, shifting, and negative-G style cues.
